series_metadata.series_description: Documents the receipt of an item or forwarding of an item to another office; no other action is taken or expected of the forwarding office.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Months after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the routine operation of an office. Includes routine correspondence, memoranda, notes and handwritten messages. Does not include records related to any major function of the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_title: Administrative Process Act (APA) Regulatory Review Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents compliance with the Administrative Process Act. COV 2.2-4000 et seq.

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after superseded, obsolete, or rescinded, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_title: Agendas, Schedules and Informational Documentation for Meetings
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the publishing of public notices of meetings, proposed schedules, along with materials reviewed or used by the board/commission/conference. May also include other items presented to the board/commission/conference or introduced by board/commission/conference members. Does not include materials used by regulatory boards in decision making. Refer to records series 100338 and 100339 for Minutes. COV 2.2-3707

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_title: Agreements, Memorandums of Understanding (MOU) and Non-Fiscal Contracts
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of signed, binding agreements, other than contracts involving procurement or payment of monies. The agreements may be between departments within the agency, other government agencies, localities, business entities or an individual or group of individuals.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after expiration, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of reports prepared by or for the agency addressing the "state" of the agency, including goals, targets, objectives and finances. COV 2.2-609

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, Archives

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the printing or publishing of calendars of agency heads intended for limited or general distribution.

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after last action, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the printing or publishing of calendars of public officials intended for limited or general distribution.

retention_rules.disposition: 1 Year after last action, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the work and reports of consultants hired by the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after no longer administratively useful, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents performance and conformance with contract stipulations not of a fiscal nature. COV 8.01-246

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after termination, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents contractual obligations of the agency or owed to the agency. COV 8.01-246

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after termination, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of incoming and outgoing letters, memoranda, faxes, notes and their attachments, in any physical format including, but not limited to, paper and e-mail. Also refer to record series 012019, "correspondence Files - Routine, Administrative."

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, Archives

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of incoming and outgoing letters, memoranda, faxes, notes and their attachments, in any physical format including, but not limited to, paper and e-mail.

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, Archives

series_metadata.series_description: Significant This series consists of incoming and outgoing letters, memoranda, faxes, notes and their attachments of a historically significant nature not listed on an agency specific schedule, in any physical format including, but not limited to, paper and e-mail.

series_metadata.series_title: Correspondence/Subject Files: Department or Division Heads - Other

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of incoming and outgoing letters, memoranda, faxes, notes and their attachments, not listed on an agency specific schedule, in any physical format including, but not limited to, paper and e-mail.

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of incoming and outgoing letters, memorandum, faxes, notes and their attachments of a routine administrative nature, not listed on an agency specific schedule, in any physical format including, but not limited to, paper and e-mail.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after no longer administratively useful, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the issuance of directives by the agency head outlining policy to lower levels of authority.

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, In Agency

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of lists the current or former employees and/or phone listings, office listings or lists of contracts or service providers.

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of materials produced during the planning, designing, and composing of a public record.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after superseded, obsolete, or rescinded, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents a school or library's eligibility, competitive bidding process, discount calculation, compliance with the Children's Internet Protection Act (CIPA), funding requests, and funding disbursements related to the Schools and Libraries Program (aka E-Rate Program) of the Universal Service Fund administered by the Universal Service Administrative Company (USAC) under the oversight of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). This series includes, but is not limited to: accreditation or charter documentation, procurement documentation, contracts, worksheets, reports, bills, invoices, and receipts. These records are closed upon the last day of the applicable funding year or the service delivery deadline for the associated funding request, whichever comes later. 47 CFR 54.516(a)

retention_rules.disposition: 10 Years after closed, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents a school or library's eligibility, competitive bidding process, discount calculation, compliance with the Children's Internet Protection Act (CIPA), funding requests, and funding disbursements related to the Schools and Libraries Program (aka E-Rate Program) of the Universal Service Fund administered by the Universal Service Administrative Company (USAC) under the oversight of the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). This series includes, but is not limited to: accreditation or charter documentation, procurement documentation, contracts, technology plans, worksheets, reports, bills, invoices, and receipts. These records are closed upon the last day of the applicable funding year or the service delivery deadline for the associated funding request, whichever comes later. 47 CFR 54.516(a)

retention_rules.disposition: 5 Years after closed, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the implementation and control of an employee suggestion plan.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after end of calendar year, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: Documents the environmental impact or major projects proposed or reviewed by agency officials. COV 15.2-2202

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents any feasibility study of a historically significant nature created by or for an agency not listed on an agency specific schedule.

series_metadata.series_description: Documents feasibility studies created by or for an agency, not listed on an agency specific schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after no longer administratively useful, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents locations of files, records or artifacts.

This series may include, but is not limited to: requests, responses, and logs. COV 2.2-3700 to 3714

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after last action, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the application and award process, authorizations, performance monitoring, and close-out process of state, federal, and/or private grant projects participated in or awarded/administered by state agencies that contain contractual terms for records retention. This series may include, but is not limited to: accounts payables and receivables, applications, in-kind/supporting documentation, draw-down requests, evaluations, fiscal reports, notifications, modification requests, and other correspondence and reports.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after terms of contract met, Confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the application and award process, authorizations, performance monitoring, and close-out process of state, federal, and/or private grant projects participated in or awarded/administered by state agencies that do not contain contractual terms for records retention. This series may include, but is not limited to: accounts payables and receivables, applications, in-kind/supporting documentation, draw-down requests, evaluations, fiscal reports, notifications, modification requests, and other correspondence and reports. 2 CFR 200.334

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after project completion, Confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents grant proposals, submitted and received, that were not awarded. This series may include, but is not limited to, letter of intent, application, proposed budget, and notification of denial.

retention_rules.disposition: 1 Year after decision, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents creation of graphic arts materials for internal or external use and copies of those materials.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after no longer administratively useful, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents administrative hearings not listed on another records retention schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: 3 Years after last action, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of significant material that conveys the history of the agency, its government, its accomplishments, its officials or employees. May be material of an exceptional nature that is listed as disposable in this or other general schedules. Includes, but is not limited to, scrapbooks, photographs, articles, program notes and documentation of events sponsored or funded by the agency. Also included are narratives; printed, audio, or audiovisual histories; or matters of significant historical importance.

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, In Agency

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents an exceptional aspect of an agency's history or an event that would have research value beyond the agency, and is documented in records scheduled as non-permanent.

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, Archives

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of records used for internal control of a process or action that does not act as the only record of final approval of the action or process.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after superseded, obsolete, or rescinded, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_title: Information and Public Education Records: Other Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of public information or education campaigns and materials or items collected from various sources about the agency. Also refer to records series 100362, "Recordings, Audio and Visual."

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after superseded, obsolete, or rescinded, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_title: Information and Public Education Records: Pamphlets, Visual Aids, and/or News
series_metadata.series_description: Clippings Regarding Historically Significant Events This series consists of historically significant public information or education campaigns and materials or items about the agency, collected from public sources. Also refer to records series 100361, "Recordings, Audio and Visual," 100357, "Public Relations Files," and 100359, "Publications."

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, In Agency

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents any internal investigation of incidents, officials, employees, departments or operations and policies not covered by another general or specific schedule.

series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of informational, courtesy or general distribution copies of legal opinions. Additional Disposition Information: Retain as long as administratively necessary, then destroy. Non-records per Virginia Public Records Act, disposal reporting on Certificate of Records Disposal (RM-3 form) not required.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after no longer administratively useful, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_title: Legal Opinions: Requested by the Agency
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of the opinions requested by the agency, its officials, employees or departments, from the agency counsel, special (outside) counsel, or the Attorney General's office on matters of law.

retention_rules.disposition: Permanent, In Agency

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the agency process to propose or promote legislation that will affect or benefit the agency. series_metadata.series_description: This series documents status of legal cases involving the agency, its officials, employees or departments.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after no longer administratively useful, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the internal control or management of a specific function of the agency which is of historical significance.

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the internal control or management of a specific function of the agency.

retention_rules.disposition: 0 Years after event, Non-confidential Destruction

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the operation of an office or completion of a function. This series may include, but is not limited to: procedures, instructions, and internal guidelines.
